location: A rare drop from sword-wielding Erdtree Burial Watchdogs. Most reliably farmed from the Watchdog guarding the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave in Mountaintops of the Giants, reached via a lift west of the Giant's Gravepost Site of Grace; a second sword-wielding Watchdog in the Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs can also drop it.
tactics: From the Giant's Gravepost grace, head west to a large tomb and take the lift down into the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave to find a farmable Watchdog.
These Watchdogs are slow but hit hard with sweeping stone-sword swings and a stunning roar — stay patient and punish after their telegraphed overheads.
It's a low-percentage random drop, not guaranteed, so expect to fight the same Watchdog many times (a Discovery/Item Discovery boost helps a lot).
The Consecrated Snowfield Catacombs has an alternate sword-wielding Watchdog guarding its boss room if you want a second farming spot.
lore: A stone greatsword carried by the Erdtree's burial watchdogs, originally set with a watching eye that graverobbers long ago pried loose, leaving behind an unseeing lump of carved rock.

builds.name: Strength Infusion Colossal
builds.why: Strength dominates its scaling and, unlike most named colossal swords, its default Ash of War can be swapped out, making it a flexible base for any Strength-focused loadout.
